work.summary: Managed vacation rental reservations and assisted in maintenance activities of over 30 properties including luxury condo, hotel condo, residential condo units, villas, and apartments. Communicated with property owners in both English and Japanese to report on property conditions and conduct repairs and/or improvements as needed.
